mapper.sql: id, config_key, enabled, provider, base_url, chat_path, api_key_ciphertext, model, temperature, top_k, fallback_enabled, cache_ttl_seconds, connect_timeout_ms, read_timeout_ms, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: update `ai_runtime_config` set enabled = #{enabled}, provider = #{provider}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, chat_path = #{chatPath}, api_key_ciphertext = #{apiKeyCiphertext}, model = #{model}, temperature = #{temperature}, top_k = #{topK}, fallback_enabled = #{fallbackEnabled}, cache_ttl_seconds = #{cacheTtlSeconds}, connect_timeout_ms = #{connectTimeoutMs}, read_timeout_ms = #{readTimeoutMs}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
